description: Twitch chat dialogue is a component used to control and manage a live stream of chat messages sent by users at Twitch from a specific channel on Twitch.

fields._canvas: The canvas this component generated for a visual twitch chat feed.
fields._panel: The panel this component generated for a visual twitch chat feed.
fields.MaxMessages: The maximum amount of messages to keep in the message feed before deleting old ones.
fields.Interface: The twitch interface that is providing and receiving events to allow this component to function.
fields._channelName: The text field that holds the name of the channel this component is displaying chat messages for.
fields._viewerCount: The text object displaying the amount of users watching ``_channelName``
fields._messagesRoot: the slot to put UIX text components under which are messages sent into ``_channelName``'s chat.
fields._messagesScrollRect: The scroll rectangle that is controlled to make sure it stays scrolled to the bottom as chat messages appear.
fields._highlightPanel: The image used for when the panel is highlighted.
fields._highlightText: The text used for when the panel is highlighted.
fields._spriteSheet: The dynamically changing sprite font for text characters like custom twitch emojis.
fields._fontCollection: A list of fonts used by chat messages from twitch.

methods.ChannelEditingStarted: Handles when the user starts editing the target channel name.
methods.ChannelEditingFinished: Handles when the user finishes editing the target channel name.
